creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you for the quick reviews :)

(In reply to John Baldwin from comment #1)

> FYI I have some WIP patches to truss to decode more syscall args but have not yet tried to decode capabilities other than fcntl rights:

That's good to know.  I've uploaded what I have for truss and cap_rights_limit at [1] which seems to work ok.  I might try to add support for cap_ioctls_{get,limit} if nobody is working on it.

[1] https://pkg.tobik.me/patches/truss-caprights.diff
